introSection: Velociraptor is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK. It is the first custom Family Boomerang model from Vekoma.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The track and supports were erected in September 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Velociraptor was built as part of Paultons Park's new-for-2016 Lost Kingdom area. It has purple track with green supports.

fullText:
Velociraptor is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK. It is the first custom Family Boomerang model from Vekoma.

The track and supports were erected in September 2015.

Velociraptor was built as part of Paultons Park's new-for-2016 Lost Kingdom area. It has purple track with green supports.
